subcodes.first_line: Thou hast been favored by God's grace, praise be unto Him, and become aware of His path, all glory be unto God. Thy remembrance is noted in His presence [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: بعنایت حق فائز شدی لله الحمد و بصراطش آگاه گشتی لله الفضل ذکرت مذکور و لحاظ
subcodes.subjects: @consolation and comfort, @praise and encouragement, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @justice and wrath of God
